docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,467.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES  ATTN: J.W. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES  ATTN: J.W. JEFFERSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POUNDERS, JOYCE M. $1,467.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,488.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,289.37 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $442.01 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT POUNDERS, JOYCE M.

JEFFERSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POUNDERS, JOYCE M. $198.63 PRINCIPAL, $442.01 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $640.64, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1488.00; CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1289.37 WAS SUBTRACTED FROM THE PRINCIPAL.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $37.56 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT POUNDERS, JOYCE M.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT POUNDERS, JOYCE M.
WRIT RETURNED FULLY SATISFIED IN THE AMOUNT OF $681.56. WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON SEPT. 4, 2008.
